♛
Rohan Shrestha
Creator & Developer
Passionate about strategy,
creativity & technology.

Hi, I'm the creator of Chess Royal — a platform built from my passion for strategy, creativity, and technology. I didn't just want to make another chess website; I wanted to create a space where players can truly enjoy the game, improve their skills, and experience chess in a more modern and engaging way.

Chess Royal is the result of my dedication to learning, building, and pushing my limits in web development. Every feature, design choice, and update reflects my effort to create something meaningful and enjoyable for users. I believe chess is more than just a game — it's a test of patience, intelligence, and decision-making, and I wanted this platform to represent that.

As a developer, I'm constantly exploring new ideas and improving my skills to make Chess Royal better with time. This is not just a project for me — it's something I take pride in and continue to grow. My goal is to keep evolving this platform, adding new features, and creating an experience that stands out.

"This is only the beginning."
